So there are some compatibility issues with the recent numpy, it should be explicitly restricted in the requirements of the main package. What happens here, is that conftest.py doesn't get copied in the package (but it should, if we include tests), so oda_api in conda doesn't have this implicit dependency (and we definitely don't want the whole conda package to depend on dispatcher.
